ecosystem: gravel stream (spawning); open ocean, river, estuary (full range)

taxonomy.note: FIRST NON-BIRD, NON-MAMMAL VERTEBRATE IN ENGINE. Class-level taxonomic expansion.

five_species.name: Sockeye (Red)
five_species.esa: Snake River: Endangered; Lake Ozette: Endangered

five_species.name: Pink (Humpy)
five_species.note: Strict 2-year cycle; odd-year Puget Sound; most abundant by biomass

components: body displacement (large fish in shallow water)
sound_profile.energy: E=5 -- continuous, energetic at peak run; not a vocalization but an unmistakable soundscape

ecological_web.forest_nutrient_cycle: Marine nitrogen from salmon carcasses fertilizes PNW forests. Trees near salmon streams show elevated growth. Bears and eagles carry nutrients away from stream banks.
ecological_web.keystone_species_note: Degree 236 is the retroactive ecological anchor for a dozen prior cross-references.

conservation.recovery_note: Elwha dam removal 2011-2014 (largest in US history at time) producing measurable salmon recovery within decade

theory_nodes.concept: FIRST FISH IN ENGINE. FIRST SALMONIDAE. Class-level expansion: Actinopterygii enters after mammals and birds. The Pacific Salmon's spawning sounds are physical (tail-slap, splash), not vocal -- a new category of sound in SPS.
theory_nodes.description: The major taxonomic milestone at degree 236.

theory_nodes.concept: Keystone species ecological web: salmon feed bears, eagles, osprey, orca, and forest trees. Cross-references to SPS 221-222, 224, 217-218. Degree 236 is the ecological anchor for the prior raptor and predator arc.
theory_nodes.description: The Pacific Salmon as the center of the PNW ecological web documented in SPS.

theory_nodes.concept: Semelparous lifecycle: born in gravel, smoltify to ocean, return by olfactory natal stream memory, spawn, die. The death fertilizes the forest. Marine nutrients moving into the terrestrial ecosystem through carcasses.
theory_nodes.description: The Pacific Salmon lifecycle and its ecological role.

cross_references.relationship: Salmon-dependent apex raptor. Skagit Valley winter congregation on dying chum salmon.
Primary live salmon predator. Kleptoparasitized by Bald Eagle.
30-40 salmon per day at peak run. Marine nitrogen in bear fat = hibernation fuel.

s36_pair.pairing_note: DOUBLE MILESTONE DEGREE. FIRST FISH + FIRST PROGRESSIVE METAL. E=5+7=12. Salmon's semelparous sacrifice vs. Queensryche's Nikki in Operation: Mindcrime -- both about individual purpose against systemic forces.

milestones: Keystone species documented -- retroactive anchor for bears, eagles, osprey, orca
